title: SharePoint/OneDrive provisioning and file_ref convention

tuw_evidence.title: Design file_ref convention and matter folder structure from OQ-001
Provision SharePoint/OneDrive sites and matter folders across three environments
Verify file_ref round trip and upload interruption partial-state prevention
Assemble W08 provisioning and G5 evidence

commands.purpose: Verify W08 predecessor state before claiming blocker evidence.

commands.command:
test -f docs/launch/l3/file-ref-convention.md; printf '%s
' $?; test -f docs/launch/l3/sharepoint-provisioning-record.md; printf '%s
' $?; test -f docs/launch/l3/file-ref-roundtrip-report.md; printf '%s
' $?
commands.purpose: Verify required W08 convention, provisioning, and roundtrip docs are absent.
Verify no W08-specific file_ref or provisioning evidence files exist.

commands.command: find apps packages scripts -maxdepth 5 -type f \( -iname '*sharepoint*' -o -iname '*onedrive*' -o -iname '*graph*' -o -iname '*file-ref*' -o -iname '*fileref*' \) -print | wc -l
commands.purpose: Verify no runtime SharePoint/OneDrive/Graph/file_ref implementation files exist in apps, packages, or scripts.

output_summary: Codex cannot choose SharePoint/OneDrive or object storage on behalf of the launch owner.
M365 runtime contract has storage_decision_resolved=false and five storage-dependent items blocked.
Training/hands-on environment keeps file_ref opaque while storage/link policy remains pending.
commands.purpose: Verify W08 storage and file_ref blockers.

commands.summary: TUW total 344, WP total 72, violations 0, PASS

blocked_claims: This record does not close LT-L3-W08.
This record does not decide MAT-DEC-03 or OQ-001.
This record does not create file_ref convention, SharePoint sites, OneDrive folders, or Graph provisioning evidence.
This record does not verify file_ref upload/resolve/download round trip or partial-state cleanup.
This record does not unseal M365 storage-dependent runtime items.
This record does not satisfy G5 or L3-EXIT.
This record does not treat the user review waiver as valid review evidence.
